description.ko: 인디고 고층 빌딩의 어둠이 마젠타와 시안색 네온 궤적의 낭만적인 빛에 의해 꿰뚫리는, 비에 젖은 사이버펑크 도시의 풍경입니다.
description.en: A rain-slicked cyberpunk cityscape where the darkness of indigo towers is pierced by the romantic glow of magenta and cyan neon trails.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Indigo Arteries.' Towering #1A0033 indigo megastructures are drenched in heavy monsoon rain, reflecting vibrant #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan holographic advertisements. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, and lens flares from flickering neon signs. 8k resolution, capturing the melancholic soul of a future city.
